license: BSD-style / open sourced legacy component; verify bundled binary license before redistribution
notes: Historically bundled with Winamp. Prefer local user-provided DLL from a trusted Winamp installation. Do not download vis_avs.dll from generic DLL sites.

license: BSD license for released source code
notes: SourceForge source package builds Winamp DLL vis_milk2.dll. projectM is recommended as modern compatible engine for native/headless rendering.
download_policy: source_or_projectm_preferred; DLL only if built locally or from trusted installation

developer: Goom project / Kodi and foobar2000 ports
license: GPL-2.0-or-later for Kodi add-on; verify exact port license before linking/distribution
platform: Cross-platform; Windows ports exist for Kodi/foobar2000, not necessarily Winamp ABI
graphics_api: software pixel buffer depending on port
winamp_entrypoint: unknown; many Goom ports are not Winamp ABI DLLs
notes: Treat Goom as an engine/port candidate, not guaranteed Winamp visualization DLL. Kodi and foobar2000 ports are useful references for Windows 11 rendering.
download_policy: source_or_port_reference_only; do not assume Winamp-compatible DLL
